2001_facup_arsenal_liverpool: Morocco and Spain played a tightly contested Round of 16 match that remained goalless through both regular time and extra time. Morocco’s goalkeeper Yassine Bounou became the hero of the tie, saving key penalties and frustrating Spanish takers. Achraf Hakimi calmly chipped his penalty down the middle to seal a 3–0 shoot-out win for Morocco.
